title: Egyptian Falafel Wrap
description: A crispy and flavorful wrap filled with Egyptian falafel, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of buttery sauce. Perfect for a quick and tasty snack or meal.

ingredients.name: Buttery sauce
ingredients.notes: mix of mayonnaise and lemon juice

instructions: Heat the buttery sauce in a small pan over medium heat.
Add the Egyptian falafel to the pan and cook until crispy on both sides.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the cooked falafel in the center of the pita bread.
Add the crunchy vegetables on top of the falafel.
Drizzle the tzatziki sauce over the vegetables.
Fold the pita bread to enclose the filling.
